scripts.build: cd backend && npx prisma generate && npm run build && cd .. && npm run build --workspace=frontend && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('frontend/.next', '.next', {recursive:true}); require('fs').cpSync('frontend/public', 'public', {recursive:true})"
scripts.start: npx prisma db push --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma && node backend/dist/server.js
